prompt: A cinematic candid night street photo in Tokyo shot from an extremely low ground-level angle, styled like a disposable film camera snapshot with direct on-camera flash, gritty realism, visible film grain, slight softness, deep shadows, strong contrast, and wet reflective pavement. In the center foreground, a androgynous young woman with straight black bob covering part of the face crouches low with one hand pressed to the rain-soaked street, leaning toward the camera in a tense, fashion-editorial pose. The face is intentionally obscured by hair and shadow. She wears 4 visible clothing items: an oversized black blazer, a white dress shirt, a black necktie, and black shorts or a short skirt barely visible beneath the jacket. She also wears 3 visible accessories/details: a ring, a bracelet, and a pair of multicolored glittering lace-up ankle boots with a mosaic sequin look. Beside her on the right stands 1 black cat with bright reflective eyes, fully visible and alert, looking toward the camera. The setting is a narrow urban alley or side street at night with rain, slick asphalt, tangled utility cables and electrical boxes covering the left wall, and 2 vertical illuminated signs with Japanese text in the background. Overhead on the right side, dense blooming cherry blossoms fill the upper corner, creating a contrast between soft flowers and harsh city textures. Include distant bokeh from streetlights and storefronts, reflections of red, white, and yellow lights on the pavement, and a moody late-night atmosphere that feels spontaneous, raw, and slightly surreal. Use a wide lens perspective, documentary street photography composition, direct flash, disposable camera aesthetic, and 1990s Japanese nightlife snapshot realism.
